ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "operating_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of the stock exchange's operating hours */,
  "operating_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of the stock exchange's operating hours */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stock exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the stock exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "pre_market_open" REAL /* Pre-market opening price */,
  "post_market_close" REAL /* Post-market closing price */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock price */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock price was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the news article was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the post */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the post was made (e.g., Twitter, Reddit) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the post (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
